name: Compelling Offer
additional_info: Madness from this Talent procs when attacking charmed enemies who are below 50% health. Using Taunt as a counter displays Prediction's visual effects but with a dark purple color. This also plays a laughing sound effect and reduces Taunt's cooldown to 1 second. Taunt counter does not deal damage, but instead stacks Taunt's damage buff effect.
desc: Any charmed enemy below 50% hit with your mantras or critical will mysteriously begin attacking everyone but you. [Madness] Your taunt also now functions as a counter that stacks damage multipliers with every successful taunt.
